title: Fishbowl Overclocked
description: A large modpack with the initial goal of spicing up my minecraft server. Feel free to use it, I've added some (but not much) documentation in game to make it as accessible as possible.
body:
Fishbowl Overclocked is a project I've started with my friends to give our server an upgraded restart. adding many content mods and almost as many quality of life mods.

This modpack is mainly focused on Create and serveral addons for it, but there's much more than just that to do in the pack. The modpack adds new biomes and more extreme and interesting world generation, as well as new structures, animals and other mobs. It also adds many quality of life and aesthetic features for multiplayer, such as customizable cosmetics and pronouns. It's up to you to decide how you play the pack, but it was made with multiplayer in mind.

If you want a multiplayer modpack with tons of Create mod addons, but still allows for fun exploration, give it a try!

<details>
<summary>Content Mods</summary>

- Aquamirae
- Better Archeology
- Creeper Overhaul
- Ender Dragon Fight Remastered
- Explorer's Compass and Nature's Compass
- Farmer's Delight
- Friends&Foes
- Gliders
- Immersive Melodies
- Magnum Torch
- Mythic Metals
- Naturalist
- Origins with several addons
- Ribbits
- Sculk Depths
- Slime Boots
- Supplementaries and Amendments
- The Bumblezone
- Trinkets
- Universal Graves
- Vein Mining (enchantment)
- Waystones

</details>

<details>
<summary>Tech Mods</summary>

- Alloy Forgery
- Botany Pots
- Create + 28 addons
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod

</details>

<details>
<summary>Magic Mods</summary>

- Spellblades and Such

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cosmetic Mods</summary>

- 3D Skin Layers
- Cosmetic Armor
- Create: Trimmed
- Distracting Trims
- Wildfire's Female Gender Mod

</details>

<details>
<summary>World Generation Mods</summary>

- BetterEnd
- MVS - Moog's Voyager Structures
- Tectonic
- Terralith
- Terrestria
- Yung's Mods

</details>

It is highly recommended you use an 8GB or more on a server for this modpack, and 6GB or more on the client. I've tested this pack on a device without a dedicated graphics card and it runs good enough to play but not great.

---

All mods in this pack are available in Modrinth.
The resource pack `BetterEnd Panorama.zip` is created by me and can be freely modified and republished by anyone in any way without a need to contact me.
